blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,942 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
